OpenAI Academy

AI Foundations

Build practical AI skills for work

Learn how artificial intelligence can help you use clear instructions, useful context, and careful review of outputs.

OpenAI Academy courses help people build practical AI skills and repeatable ways of working.

Overview

Practice deciding what to delegate to AI while staying in control of the final work.

Course completion certificates are available after you finish the required lessons.
